title: Beille Kitchen Knife Set Cooking Baking Supplies Meal Prep with Wood Storage
description:
If you’ve been meaning to upgrade your kitchen knife set or are looking to purchase your first full knife set, look no further than the Beille 13pc Stainless Steel Kitchen Cooking Baking Supplies Meal Prep Knife Set with Wood Storage Block and scissors! The knife set is constructed from durable stainless steel that ensures optimum sharpness for precise cutting, chopping and slicing, while the black, ergonomic handles provide comfort and confidence when handling; this knife set will easily meet all your food prep needs, whether you’re making an easy summer salad, preparing salmon, mincing meat or chopping herbs for roasted potatoes! The knife set is dishwasher safe (although hand washing is recommended), and will tuck tidily away in the included wood block for easy storage

Beille Kitchen Knife Set Cooking Baking Supplies Meal Prep with Wood Storage

If you’ve been meaning to upgrade your kitchen knife set or are looking to purchase your first full knife set, look no further than the Beille 13pc Stainless Steel Kitchen Cooking Baking Supplies Meal Prep Knife Set with Wood Storage Block and scissors!

The knife set is constructed from durable stainless steel that ensures optimum sharpness for precise cutting, chopping and slicing, while the black, ergonomic handles provide comfort and confidence when handling; this knife set will easily meet all your food prep needs, whether you’re making an easy summer salad, preparing salmon, mincing meat or chopping herbs for roasted potatoes! The knife set is dishwasher safe (although hand washing is recommended), and will tuck tidily away in the included wood block for easy storage.

Key Features

  • QUALITY KNIFE SET: The knife set is constructed from quality, stainless steel that ensures optimum sharpness for precise cutting, chopping and slicing, while the black ergonomic handles provide comfort and confidence when handling; a kitchen essential for all cooking, baking and meal prep needs
  • ESSENTIAL SANTOKU CHEF KNIFE: This comprehensive knife set features a must have Santoku chef's knife that will cover a ton of ground in your kitchen; the Santoku's blade and handle are designed to work in harmony, by matching the blade's width and weight to the weight of the tang and the handle
  • EASY CLEANING AND STORAGE: Dishwasher safe but hand washing is recommended; rust and corrosion resistant, all the components of the knife set fit tidily into the wood block for easy storage; this knife set will look stylish and modern on any kitchen counter, kitchen island or food prep station
  • 13PC KITCHEN MEAL PREP KNIFE SET INCLUDES: Your set includes 1 Santoku chef's knife, carving knife, boning knife, pairing knife, utility knife, 8 table steak knives, black kitchen scissors or shears and wood block for countertop storage
  • SPECIFICATIONS: Dimensions: 14 x 6.5 x 4.5 inches; Weight: 4.6lbs; Materials: Stainless steel knives, wood storage block, ABS handles

Product Specifications

  • MPN: BLE825051
  • UPC: 810058489258
  • Color: Black
  • Size: 13pc

The highlight of this knife set is the Santoku chef knife. Specifically, the Santoku's blade and handle are designed to work in harmony, by matching the blade's width and weight to the weight of the tang and the handle. Covering a ton of ground in your kitchen, this chef knife can prep, cut, chop and slice just about everything. It can be used for everything from mincing, slicing and chopping fruit and vegetables, to slicing meet or disjointing large cuts of poultry.

KNIFE SET INCLUDES:

-Chef Knife for multipurpose cutting, chopping and slicing -Carving Knife for slice thin cuts of meat, including poultry, roasts, hams, and other large cooked meats -Boning Knife for removing the bones of poultry, meat, and fish -Paring Knife for peeling fruits and vegetables, and other small or intricate work such as de-veining a shrimp, removing seeds from a jalapeño or preparing small garnishes -Utility Knife for general kitchen tasks like slicing meat, cutting sandwiches, chopping vegetables, slicing herbs or any other task when no other specific kitchen knife will do -X8 4Steak Knives that are sharp, serrated table knives used for cutting steak -Kitchen scissors or shears -Wood Block (with felt pads to prevent slippage) for easy kitchen countertop storage
